---
title: "migrate_p1_history.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/migrate_p1_history.ts"
loc: 43
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.35
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 4.19
overall_score: 3.54
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [getDb](file://../src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.js)
- [AgentPing](file://../src/tools/pennyone/types.js)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `migrate`
- `sessionsDir`
- `db`
- `files`
- `jsonFiles`
- `content`
- `pings`
- `agentId`
- `startTs`
- `endTs`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `sessionId`
- `insertPing`
- `migratePings`
